name: Upgrade ROSA HCP Control Plane
description: Upgrade a ROSA HCP cluster control plane to the next available OpenShift version via ROSAControlPlane spec.version patch

playbooks.name: Upgrade Control Plane
playbooks.description: Upgrades the ROSAControlPlane to the next available version and waits for completion

documentation.overview: This test suite upgrades a ROSA HCP cluster's control plane version. It auto-detects the next available upgrade version, patches the ROSAControlPlane resource, and waits for the upgrade to complete.
prerequisites: An existing ROSA HCP cluster in ready state
MCE/ACM hub cluster with CAPI/CAPA configured

quick_start.description: Upgrades the control plane to the first available version automatically

customization.cluster_name: Name of the cluster to upgrade (required)
customization.requested_version: Specific version to upgrade to (optional, defaults to first available)
customization.capi_namespace: Namespace containing the ROSAControlPlane resource (default: ns-rosa-hcp)

expected_results: ROSAControlPlane spec.version patched to requested version
Playbook waits for ROSAControlPlane status.ready to become true
Cluster fully upgraded and ready (max wait: 60 minutes)
